How to Set Up Business Manager
Framework Foundations
You can easily navigate between Facebook advertising platforms to efficiently manage
your ad campaigns and insights. To get to Ads Manager from Business Manager:
1. Open Business Manager.
2. Click on Ad Account on the top left-hand side.
3. When the navigation opens, click on the Ad Account in question
4. Click on the 'View in Ads Manager' link
Mark As Complete
